mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_XX (lmid, lbid, fbdw, bt, nr, keys, fbrq, hits, plsx, Uid, bmid, PicUrl, fujian, bmi, zhyw, canComment, reqAccept, isPicNews, isImport, linkUrl, jrdd, tcxx, dtime, tcw, tch, tcl, tct, canps, btcolor, sffb, sfbtj, stcy, ydjw) values(#{lmid}, #{lbid}, #{fbdw}, #{bt}, #{nr}, #{keys}, #{fbrq}, #{hits}, #{plsx}, #{Uid}, #{bmid}, #{PicUrl}, #{fujian}, #{bmi}, #{zhyw}, #{canComment}, #{reqAccept}, #{isPicNews}, #{isImport}, #{linkUrl}, #{jrdd}, #{tcxx}, #{dtime}, #{tcw}, #{tch}, #{tcl}, #{tct}, #{canps}, #{btcolor}, #{sffb}, #{sfbtj}, #{stcy}, #{ydjw} )
